strengths: 6+ years as a Full Stack Engineer with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Strong background in scalable systems (handled millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework requirement)
Minimal evidence of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) usage in recent roles
response.justification: The candidate meets the core technical requirements with 6+ years in Full Stack development using TypeScript, Node.js, and React, including scalable systems experience at Dunnhumby. Their AI-agent infrastructure work aligns with emerging tech demands. However, they lack explicit Nest.js experience (primary stack requirement) and Vitest (testing framework), and cloud platform usage isn't clearly evidenced. The gaps are significant but not dealbreakers for a mid-senior role.
